## Industry use case highlights
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68836cf9cff21bf9efa61419/6941c589e666bb29ded972a3_drug-development.avif) Quantum-accelerated drug development In collaboration with AstraZeneca, AWS, and NVIDIA, IonQ executed the largest quantum-accelerated electronic structure simulation performed to date. This groundbreaking approach accelerated the complex chemistry simulation by at least 656 times. Read more ](https://www.ionq.com/blog/ecosystem-innovation-ionqs-life-sciences-application-workflow-accelerates)[![Enterprise-grade LLMs with quantum fine tuning](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68836cf9cff21bf9efa61419/690fd497ac4ec6a3aa8f61e1_Frame%202147223797%20\(4\).avif) Enterprise-grade LLMs with quantum fine tuning IonQ's quantum fine-tuning is a hybrid approach that adds a quantum layer to classical AI models. This method makes LLMs smarter and more efficient by capturing higher-dimensional patterns that classical systems miss. Read more ](https://www.ionq.com/resources/ionqs-quantum-ai-in-action-smarter-more-energy-efficient-less-resource-intensive)[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68836cf9cff21bf9efa61419/6942d73fc406ec83d8a9c0c5_election%20microscopy.avif) Advancing automotive materials with quantum AI IonQ partnered with a leading global automotive manufacturer, applying quantum-classical AI to solve critical materials science challenges. Our model successfully generated higher-fidelity synthetic data for steel microstructures. Read more ](https://www.ionq.com/blog/ionq-and-leading-global-automotive-manufacturer-collaborate-to-advance)[![Unlocking foundry-scale 
quantum production](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68836cf9cff21bf9efa61419/690fd497f11726f32e498267_Frame%202147223797%20\(3\).avif) Unlocking foundry-scale   
quantum production IonQ is pioneering the use of quantum-grade diamond thin films, a breakthrough that allows diamond quantum devices to be manufactured at an industrial scale. This approach leverages semiconductor techniques, dramatically simplifying manufacturing. Read more ](https://www.ionq.com/blog/diamond-thin-films-unlock-foundry-scale-production-for-quantum-technologies)[![Enterprise ready quantum computer](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68836cf9cff21bf9efa61419/6954119201c156ac63c4c81a_Forte%20Enterprise.avif) Machine learning image recognition For self driving cars to become a reality, vehicles must interface with road signs in the physical world. In our work with Hyundai, we explored loading images of road signs into our quantum computers for analysis. With only 8 qubits, we successfully trained a quantum machine learning image recognition algorithm to recognize common road signs with fewer input parameters than comparable classical approaches. Read more ](https://www.ionq.com/resources/learn-quantum-machine-learning-image-recognition-application)

## A quantum cloud made for developers
Forget translating your work into yet another quantum SDK. IonQ works with all of the most popular cloud providers, libraries and tools. Just sign in and get to work.
[Learn more](https://www.ionq.com/quantum-cloud)[Sign up](https://identity.ionq.com/create-account)

</style></div><div class="hidden-js w-embed w-script"><script>
  if (window.innerWidth >= 992) {
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
      var navRoot = document.querySelector('.navigation');
      var navBg = document.querySelector('.nav-dd-list-bg');
      var navOverlay = document.querySelector('.nav-close-overlay');
      var navDropdowns = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.nav-dropdown.w-dropdown'));

      var navOverlayDelayTimeout = null;
      var navIsSwitching = false;
      var navOverlayIsVisible = false;

      function navGetListAndInner(navDropdown) {
        var navList = navDropdown.querySelector('.w-dropdown-list');
        if (!navList) return { list: null, inner: null };
        var navInner = navList.firstElementChild || navList;
        return { list: navList, inner: navInner };
      }

      function navAnyOpen() {
        return navDropdowns.some(function(navDD) {
          var pair = navGetListAndInner(navDD);
          return pair.list && pair.list.classList.contains('w--open');
        });
      }

      function navShowOverlayImmediate() {
        if (!navOverlay) return;
        if (navOverlayIsVisible) return;
        navOverlayIsVisible = true;
        navOverlay.style.display = "block";
        navOverlay.style.opacity = "0";
        requestAnimationFrame(function() {
          navOverlay.style.transition = "opacity 250ms ease";
          navOverlay.style.opacity = "1";
        });
      }

      function navHideOverlayImmediate() {
        if (!navOverlay) return;
        navOverlay.style.transition = "opacity 250ms ease";
        navOverlay.style.opacity = "0";
        setTimeout(function() {
          navOverlay.style.display = "none";
          navOverlayIsVisible = false;
        }, 250);
      }

      function navUpdateOverlay(triggeredFromClick) {
        clearTimeout(navOverlayDelayTimeout);
        var openExists = navAnyOpen();

        if (!openExists) {
          if (navIsSwitching) {
            navOverlayDelayTimeout = setTimeout(function() {
              if (!navAnyOpen()) {
                navHideOverlayImmediate();
                if (navRoot) {
                  navRoot.classList.remove('open');
                }
                navIsSwitching = false;
              }
            }, 170);
          } else {
            navHideOverlayImmediate();
            if (navRoot) {
              navRoot.classList.remove('open');
            }
            navIsSwitching = false;
          }
          return;
        }

        navIsSwitching = false;

        if (navRoot) {
          navRoot.classList.add('open');
        }

        if (triggeredFromClick === true) {
          navShowOverlayImmediate();
        }
      }

      function navUpdateBgHeight() {
        var navOpen = null;

        navDropdowns.forEach(function(navDD) {
          var pair = navGetListAndInner(navDD);
          if (pair.list && pair.list.classList.contains('w--open')) {
            navOpen = pair;
          }
        });

        if (!navOpen) {
          if (navBg) {
            navBg.style.height = '0px';
          }
          navUpdateOverlay(false);
          return;
        }

        var h1 = navOpen.inner.scrollHeight;
        var h2 = navRoot ? navRoot.offsetHeight || 0 : 0;
        if (navBg) {
          navBg.style.height = (h1 + h2) + 'px';
        }
        navUpdateOverlay(true);
      }

      navDropdowns.forEach(function(navDD) {
        var navToggle = navDD.querySelector('.w-dropdown-toggle');
        if (!navToggle) return;

        navToggle.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
          e.stopPropagation();
          var anyOpenNow = navAnyOpen();
          var pair = navGetListAndInner(navDD);
          var thisIsOpen = pair.list && pair.list.classList.contains('w--open');
          if (anyOpenNow && !thisIsOpen) {
            navIsSwitching = true;
          } else {
            navIsSwitching = false;
          }
        });

        $(window).on("scroll", function () {
          var pair = navGetListAndInner(navDD);
          if (pair.list && pair.list.classList.contains("w--open")) {
            $(navDD).trigger('w-close.w-dropdown');
            if (navBg) {
              navBg.style.height = '0px';
            }
            clearTimeout(navOverlayDelayTimeout);
            navHideOverlayImmediate();
            if (navRoot) {
              navRoot.classList.remove('open');
            }
            navIsSwitching = false;
          }
        });
      });

      navDropdowns.forEach(function(navDD) {
        var pair = navGetListAndInner(navDD);
        if (!pair.list) return;

        var observer = new MutationObserver(function() {
          navUpdateBgHeight();
        });

        observer.observe(pair.list, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['class', 'style'] });
      });

      if (navOverlay) {
        navOverlay.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
          e.stopPropagation();
          navDropdowns.forEach(function(navDD) {
            $(navDD).trigger('w-close.w-dropdown');
          });
          if (navBg) {
            navBg.style.height = '0px';
          }
          clearTimeout(navOverlayDelayTimeout);
          navHideOverlayImmediate();
          if (navRoot) {
            navRoot.classList.remove('open');
          }
          navIsSwitching = false;
        });
      }

      document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        if (!navAnyOpen()) return;
        if (!e.target.closest('.nav-dropdown')) {
          navDropdowns.forEach(function(navDD) {
            $(navDD).trigger('w-close.w-dropdown');
          });
          if (navBg) {
            navBg.style.height = '0px';
          }
          clearTimeout(navOverlayDelayTimeout);
          navHideOverlayImmediate();
          if (navRoot) {
            navRoot.classList.remove('open');
          }
          navIsSwitching = false;
        }
      });

    });
  }
</script>

</script></div><div class="gated-content-js w-embed w-script"><script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const COOKIE_PREFIX = "__Secure-Session-US-Web";
  const COOKIE_DOMAIN = ".ionq.com";

  function getCookieByPrefix(prefix) {
    const row = document.cookie
      .split(";")
      .map(r => r.trim())
      .find(r => r.startsWith(prefix));
    return row ? decodeURIComponent(row.split("=")[1]) : null;
  }

  function getCookieNameByPrefix(prefix) {
    const row = document.cookie
      .split(";")
      .map(r => r.trim())
      .find(r => r.startsWith(prefix));
    return row ? row.split("=")[0] : null;
  }

  function deleteIonqSessionCookie() {
    const actualCookieName = getCookieNameByPrefix(COOKIE_PREFIX);
    if (!actualCookieName) return;

    document.cookie =
      actualCookieName +
      "=; Domain=" +
      COOKIE_DOMAIN +
      "; Path=/; Max-Age=0; Secure; SameSite=None";
  }

  async function isIonqUserLoggedIn() {
    const token = getCookieByPrefix(COOKIE_PREFIX);
    if (!token) return false;

    try {
      const res = await fetch("https://api.ionq.co/v0.3/users/me", {
        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` }
      });

      if (res.status !== 200) return false;

      const user = await res.json();
      return !!(user && user.confirmed === true);
    } catch (e) {
      return false;
    }
  }

  function applyAuthVisibility(isLoggedIn) {
    document.querySelectorAll('[auth="off"]').forEach(el => {
      el.style.setProperty("display", isLoggedIn ? "none" : "flex", "important");
    });

    document.querySelectorAll('[auth="on"]').forEach(el => {
      el.style.setProperty("display", isLoggedIn ? "flex" : "none", "important");
    });
  }

  const signOutBtn = document.querySelector('[auth-btn="sign-out"]');
  if (signOutBtn) {
    signOutBtn.addEventListener("click", function () {
      deleteIonqSessionCookie();
      applyAuthVisibility(false);
    });
  }

  isIonqUserLoggedIn().then(isLoggedIn => {
    applyAuthVisibility(isLoggedIn);
  });
});

This method makes LLMs smarter and more efficient by capturing higher-dimensional patterns that classical systems miss.</p></div><div rel="noopener noreferrer" class="button-link"><div>Read more</div><div class="resources-card-button-icon w-embed"><svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 18 19" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

Our model successfully generated higher-fidelity synthetic data for steel microstructures.</p></div><div rel="noopener noreferrer" class="button-link"><div>Read more</div><div class="resources-card-button-icon w-embed"><svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 18 19" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

quantum production" class="cover-image absolute"></div><div class="use-case-item-content"><div class="column"><h3 class="heading-style-h6 text-white margin-2xs">Unlocking foundry-scale <br>quantum production</h3><p class="text-tertiary">IonQ is pioneering the use of quantum-grade diamond thin films, a breakthrough that allows diamond quantum devices to be manufactured at an industrial scale. This approach leverages semiconductor techniques, dramatically simplifying manufacturing.</p></div><div rel="noopener noreferrer" class="button-link"><div>Read more</div><div class="resources-card-button-icon w-embed"><svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 18 19" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

</svg></div><div class="button-link-underline"></div></div></div></a><a data-w-id="47c475f1-37da-bc9c-f6d9-7b3bce7e7f36" href="/resources/learn-quantum-machine-learning-image-recognition-application" class="swiper-slide use-case-item w-inline-block" role="group" aria-label="5 / 5" style="width: 306.5px; margin-right: 16px;"><div class="use-case-image"><img src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68836cf9cff21bf9efa61419/6954119201c156ac63c4c81a_Forte%20Enterprise.avif" loading="lazy" alt="Enterprise ready quantum computer" class="cover-image absolute"></div><div class="use-case-item-content"><div class="column"><h3 class="heading-style-h6 text-white margin-2xs">Machine learning image recognition</h3><p class="text-tertiary">For self driving cars to become a reality, vehicles must interface with road signs in the physical world. In our work with Hyundai, we explored loading images of road signs into our quantum computers for analysis. With only 8 qubits, we successfully trained a quantum machine learning image recognition algorithm to recognize common road signs with fewer input parameters than comparable classical approaches.</p></div><div rel="noopener noreferrer" class="button-link"><div>Read more</div><div class="resources-card-button-icon w-embed"><svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 18 19" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

<script>
  const browseMenu = document.querySelector('.browse-content-tab-menu');
  const browseLinks = document.querySelectorAll('.browse-content-tab-link');
  const browsePanes = document.querySelectorAll('.browse-content-tab-pane');
  const browseUnderline = document.querySelector('.browse-content-tab-link-underline');

  function browseMoveUnderline(browseTarget) {
    const { offsetLeft, offsetWidth } = browseTarget;
    browseUnderline.style.width = `${offsetWidth}px`;
    browseUnderline.style.left = `${offsetLeft}px`;
  }

  function browseScrollToTab(browseTarget, browseIndex) {
    if (window.innerWidth >= 768) return;

    const browseMenuWidth = browseMenu.offsetWidth;
    const browseLinkWidth = browseTarget.offsetWidth;
    const browseLinkLeft = browseTarget.offsetLeft;

    if (browseIndex === 0) {
      browseMenu.scrollTo({ left: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
    } else if (browseIndex === browseLinks.length - 1) {
      browseMenu.scrollTo({ left: browseMenu.scrollWidth, behavior: 'smooth' });
    } else {
      const browseScrollPos = browseLinkLeft - (browseMenuWidth / 2) + (browseLinkWidth / 2);
      browseMenu.scrollTo({ left: browseScrollPos, behavior: 'smooth' });
    }
  }

  browseLinks.forEach((browseLink, browseIndex) => {
    browseLink.addEventListener('click', e => {
      e.preventDefault();

      browseLinks.forEach(l => l.classList.remove('active'));
      browseLink.classList.add('active');

      browsePanes.forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
      browsePanes[browseIndex].classList.add('active');

      browseMoveUnderline(browseLink);
      browseScrollToTab(browseLink, browseIndex);
    });
  });

  const browseActiveLink = document.querySelector('.browse-content-tab-link.active');
  if (browseActiveLink) browseMoveUnderline(browseActiveLink);

</script>

<path d="M17.75 3H20.8171L14.1171 10.6239L22 21H15.8286L10.9914 14.7082L5.46286 21H2.39286L9.55857 12.8427L2 3.00142H8.32857L12.6943 8.75126L17.75 3ZM16.6714 19.1728H18.3714L7.4 4.73219H5.57714L16.6714 19.1728Z" fill="CurrentColor"></path>

</svg></div></a></div></div></div><div class="hidden-js w-embed w-script"><script>
  // --------------------------------------------------------------------
  // MAIN SCRIPT
  // --------------------------------------------------------------------

  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {


    // ####################################
    /**
 * Minimalni JSONP helper – isti princip kao u testMailchimp snippetu.
 * url: baza URL-a (može već da sadrži query parametre)
 * callbackParamName: npr. "c" za Mailchimp
 * cb: function (err, data)
 */
    function jsonp(url, callbackParamName, cb) {
      const callbackName =
            "mcJsonpCallback_" + Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 10);

      const script = document.createElement("script");

      const separator = url.includes("?") ? "&" : "?";
      script.src = url + separator + callbackParamName + "=" + callbackName;

      window[callbackName] = function (data) {
        try {
          cb(null, data);
        } finally {
          delete window[callbackName];
          script.remove();
        }
      };

      script.onerror = function (err) {
        try {
          cb(err || new Error("JSONP network error"));
        } finally {
          delete window[callbackName];
          script.remove();
        }
      };

      document.body.appendChild(script);
    }

    /**
 * Šalje podatke iz forme ka Mailchimpu preko JSONP-a.
 * Očekuje:
 *  - <form mailchimp-url="...">
 *  - inpute sa [data-mailchimp="EMAIL"], [data-mailchimp="NAME"], itd.
 *
 * @param {HTMLFormElement} form
 * @returns {Promise<any>}  // resolve(data) iz Mailchimp-a
 */
    function sendMailchimpFromForm(form) {
      if (!form) {
        return Promise.reject(new Error("Form element nije prosleđen."));
      }

      const mailchimpURL = form.getAttribute("mailchimp-url");
      if (!mailchimpURL) {
        return Promise.reject(
          new Error('Form nema "mailchimp-url" atribut.')
        );
      }

      // Skupi sve fieldove koji imaju data-mailchimp atribut
      const fields = form.querySelectorAll("[data-mailchimp]");

      if (!fields.length) {
        console.error(
          "❌ Form nema nijedan element sa [data-mailchimp] atributom.",
          form
        );
        return Promise.reject(
          new Error("Form nema nijedan [data-mailchimp] field.")
        );
      }

      // Napravi params objekat iz fieldova
      const params = {};
      fields.forEach((field) => {
        const key = field.getAttribute("data-mailchimp"); // npr. "EMAIL", "NAME"
        if (!key) return;

        const value =
              field.value != null
        ? field.value
        : field.getAttribute("value") || "";

        params[key] = value;
      });

      console.log("📝 Mailchimp params iz forme:", params);

      // Umesto toQueryString – koristimo URLSearchParams direktno
      const searchParams = new URLSearchParams();
      Object.keys(params).forEach((key) => {
        const val = params[key];
        if (val != null && val !== "") {
          searchParams.append(key, val);
        }
      });

      const queryString = searchParams.toString();
      if (!queryString) {
        console.error("❌ Query string je prazan iako postoje fieldovi.");
        return Promise.reject(
          new Error("Nema nijednog validnog data-mailchimp parametra.")
        );
      }

      // mailchimpURL već treba da sadrži ?u=...&id=...
      const separator = mailchimpURL.includes("?") ? "&" : "?";
      const requestUrl = mailchimpURL + separator + queryString;

      console.log("🌐 Mailchimp request URL:", requestUrl);

      return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        jsonp(
          requestUrl,
          "c", // Mailchimp callback param, kao u prvom snippetu
          (err, data) => {
            if (err) {
              console.error("Mailchimp JSONP error:", err);
              reject(err);
            } else {
              // console.log("Mailchimp response:", data);
              resolve(data);
            }
          }
        );
      });
    }

    //######################################

    const DEBUG_MODE = true;

    function log(message, data) {
      if (DEBUG_MODE) console.log(message, data || "");
    }

    // --- UTILS ---

    function getGoogleAnalyticsClientId() {
      try {
        const match = document.cookie.match(/_ga=GA1\.1\.(\d+\.\d+)/);
        return match ? match[1] : null;
      } catch (e) {
        return null;
      }
    }

    function getReferrerIds(queryString) {
      const params = new URLSearchParams(queryString);
      const keys = [
        "utm_source",
        "utm_medium",
        "utm_campaign",
        "utm_content",
        "utm_term",
        "gclid",
        "fbclid",
        "msclkid",
        "li_fat_id"
      ];
      const result = {};
      keys.forEach((key) => {
        if (params.has(key)) result[key] = params.get(key);
      });
      return result;
    }

    // --- INTEGRACIJA SA formState (validation handler) ---

    const trackedForms = document.querySelectorAll('form[data-tracker="true"]');

    // Ako formState ne postoji (validation skripta nije učitana) → ne radimo ništa
    if (typeof formState === "undefined") {
      log("[Segment handler] formState nije definisan, preskačem registraciju onComplete handlera.");
    } else {
      trackedForms.forEach((form) => {
        const func = () => {
          // code
          handleFormSubmit(form);
          //############################
          //funkcija za mailchimp
          const mailchimpUrl = form.getAttribute("mailchimp-url");
          if (mailchimpUrl && mailchimpUrl.trim() !== "") {
            sendMailchimpFromForm(form)
              .then((data) => {
              console.log("✅ Mailchimp response:", data);
            })
              .catch((err) => {
              console.error("❌ Greška pri slanju ka Mailchimpu:", err);
            });
          }
          // ###########################
        };
        // email-form-1 == form ID
        formState[form.id] = {
          onComplete: func
        };
        log("[Segment handler] Registered formState handler for:", form.id);
      });
    }

    // --- GLAVNA LOGIKA ---

    function handleFormSubmit(form) {
      log("Form submit detected. Processing...", form);

      const segmentIdentify = {};
      const segmentTrack = {};

      const gaId = getGoogleAnalyticsClientId();
      const formNameAttr = form.getAttribute("data-form-name");
      const formMode = form.getAttribute("data-form-mode") || "track";
      const urlMode = form.getAttribute("data-url-mode") || "track";
      const eventName =
            form.getAttribute("data-segment-event") || "Form Submit";

      const minimalSegment =
            form.getAttribute("data-segment-minimal") === "true";
      const shouldIdentify =
            form.getAttribute("data-segment-identify") !== "false";

      const disableFormUrl =
            form.getAttribute("data-segment-url") === "disabled";

      const inputs = form.querySelectorAll("input, select, textarea");

      inputs.forEach((input) => {
        // 0) Globalni skip + submit dugmad
        if (
          input.type === "submit" ||
          input.getAttribute("data-skip") === "true"
        )
          return;

        // 1) vrednost (posebno za checkbox/radio)
        let value = input.value;

        const segmentOverride = input.getAttribute("data-segment-value");
        if (segmentOverride !== null) {
          value = segmentOverride;
        }

        if (input.type === "checkbox" || input.type === "radio") {
          if (!input.checked) return; // ne šaljemo unchecked
          if (segmentOverride === null) {
            value = input.value || true;
          }
        }
        if (value == null || value === "") return;

        const rawName = input.name || input.id || "unknown_field";

        // SEGMENT kontrola
        const segmentMode = input.getAttribute("data-segment-mode") || "both";
        const segmentKey =
              input.getAttribute("data-segment-key") || rawName;

        // 2) Specijalni slučajevi – PRE generičke logike
        const identity = input.getAttribute("data-identity");
        const isEmail = identity === "email" || input.type === "email";

        // 2.1 Marketing consent
        if (input.getAttribute("data-consent") === "marketing") {
          segmentIdentify["marketing_contact"] = "Marketing contact";
          return;
        }

        // 2.2 Full name
        if (identity === "full_name") {
          const parts = value.trim().split(/\s+/);
          const fName = parts.shift() || "";
          const lName = parts.join(" ");

          const fullNameMode = input.getAttribute("data-segment-mode") || "identify";
          if (fullNameMode !== "none") {
            if (fullNameMode === "identify" || fullNameMode === "both") {
              segmentIdentify["first_name"] = fName;
              if (lName) {
                segmentIdentify["last_name"] = lName;
              }
            }
            if (fullNameMode === "track" || fullNameMode === "both") {
              segmentTrack["first_name"] = fName;
              if (lName) {
                segmentTrack["last_name"] = lName;
              }
            }
          }
          return;
        }

        // 2.3 Email
        if (isEmail) {
          const emailMode = input.getAttribute("data-segment-mode") || "identify";
          if (emailMode !== "none") {
            if (emailMode === "identify" || emailMode === "both") {
              segmentIdentify["email"] = value;
            }
            if (emailMode === "track" || emailMode === "both") {
              segmentTrack["email"] = value;
            }
          }
          return;
        }

        // 2.4 First name
        if (identity === "first_name") {
          const firstNameMode = input.getAttribute("data-segment-mode") || "identify";
          if (firstNameMode !== "none") {
            if (firstNameMode === "identify" || firstNameMode === "both") {
              segmentIdentify["first_name"] = value;
            }
            if (firstNameMode === "track" || firstNameMode === "both") {
              segmentTrack["first_name"] = value;
            }
          }
          return;
        }

        // 2.5 Last name
        if (identity === "last_name") {
          const lastNameMode = input.getAttribute("data-segment-mode") || "identify";
          if (lastNameMode !== "none") {
            if (lastNameMode === "identify" || lastNameMode === "both") {
              segmentIdentify["last_name"] = value;
            }
            if (lastNameMode === "track" || lastNameMode === "both") {
              segmentTrack["last_name"] = value;
            }
          }
          return;
        }

        // 3) GENERIČKA Segment logika
        if (segmentMode !== "none") {
          if (segmentMode === "track" || segmentMode === "both") {
            segmentTrack[segmentKey] = value;
          }
          if (segmentMode === "identify" || segmentMode === "both") {
            segmentIdentify[segmentKey] = value;
          }
        }
      });

      // --- METADATA + REFERRER ---

      const metadata = {
        GA4_client_ID: gaId
      };

      if (formNameAttr) {
        metadata.form_name = formNameAttr;
      }

      if (!disableFormUrl) {
        metadata.form_url = window.location.href;
      }

      const referrerData = getReferrerIds(window.location.search);

      // --- SEGMENT ---

      if (window.analytics) {
        let finalTrack = { ...metadata, ...segmentTrack };

        // IonQ-style minimal event → samo meta
        if (minimalSegment) {
          finalTrack = { ...metadata };
        }

        const categoryAttr = form.getAttribute("data-segment-category");
        if (categoryAttr) {
          finalTrack.category = categoryAttr;
        }

        const labelAttr = form.getAttribute("data-segment-label");
        if (labelAttr) {
          finalTrack.label = labelAttr;
        }

        if (formMode === "identify") {
          delete finalTrack.form_name;
        }
        if (urlMode === "identify") {
          delete finalTrack.form_url;
        }

        log("[Segment] Track:", finalTrack);
        window.analytics.track(eventName, finalTrack);

        if (shouldIdentify && segmentIdentify.email) {
          const finalIdentify = {
            ...metadata,
            ...referrerData,
            ...segmentIdentify
          };

          if (formMode === "track") {
            delete finalIdentify.form_name;
          }
          if (urlMode === "track") {
            delete finalIdentify.form_url;
          }

          log("[Segment] Identify:", finalIdentify);
          window.analytics.identify(finalIdentify);
        }
      }
    }

  });
</script></div><div class="hidden-css w-embed"><style>
  .contact-form input:-webkit-autofill,
  .contact-form input:-webkit-autofill:hover,
  .contact-form input:-webkit-autofill:focus,
  .contact-form textarea:-webkit-autofill,

var Webflow = Webflow || [];
Webflow.push(function () {
    var $body = $(document.body);
    var scrollPosition = 0;

    $('[scroll="disable"]').on('click', function () {
        var oldWidth = $body.innerWidth();
        scrollPosition = window.pageYOffset;
        $body.css('overflow', 'hidden');
        $body.css('position', 'fixed');
        $body.css('top', `-${scrollPosition}px`);
        $body.width(oldWidth);
    });
    $('[scroll="enable"]').on('click', function () {
        if ($body.css('overflow') != 'hidden') { scrollPosition = window.pageYOffset; }
        $body.css('overflow', '');
        $body.css('position', '');
        $body.css('top', '');
        $body.width('');
        $(window).scrollTop(scrollPosition);
    });
    $('[scroll="both"]').on('click', function () {
        if ($body.css('overflow') !== 'hidden') {
            var oldWidth = $body.innerWidth();
            scrollPosition = window.pageYOffset;
            $body.css('overflow', 'hidden');
            $body.css('position', 'fixed');
            $body.css('top', `-${scrollPosition}px`);
            $body.width(oldWidth);
        } else {
            $body.css('overflow', '');
            $body.css('position', '');
            $body.css('top', '');
            $body.width('');
            $(window).scrollTop(scrollPosition);
        }
    });
});
</script>

<script>

  var authActionTrigger = event.target.closest(
    '[auth-btn="sign-in"], [auth-btn="sign-up"]'

  var preAuthLocation =

    window.location.search +
    window.location.hash;

  sessionStorage.setItem("postLoginRedirect", preAuthLocation);
});

<script>
  var partnersPerPageSetting = 6;

  if (window.innerWidth <= 479) {
    partnersPerPageSetting = 2.5;
  }

  var partnersSliders = document.querySelectorAll(".splide.home-partners-slider");

  partnersSliders.forEach(function(sliderElement) {
    var isReversed = sliderElement.classList.contains("reverse");

    new Splide(sliderElement, {
      type: "loop",
      drag: false,
      focus: "center",
      gap: "1.25rem",
      perPage: partnersPerPageSetting,
      autoScroll: {
        speed: isReversed ? -0.6 : 0.6,
        pauseOnHover: false,
        pauseOnFocus: false
      },
      arrows: false,
      pagination: false,
      dragMinThreshold: 20
    }).mount(window.splide.Extensions);
  });
</script>

<script>
  if (window.innerWidth >= 992) {
    const valuesCards = document.querySelectorAll('.values-card');
    const valuesImages = document.querySelectorAll('.values-image');
    let valuesActiveIndex = 0;

    valuesCards.forEach((card, index) => {
      card.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
        if (valuesActiveIndex !== index) {
          valuesImages[valuesActiveIndex].classList.remove('active');
          valuesImages[index].classList.add('active');
          valuesActiveIndex = index;
        }
      });
    });
  }
